# 6.3 Evaluate Metrics
Justify your choice of evaluation metrics. For imbalanced churn data, accuracy alone is insufficient. You should report:
- Accuracy — Overall correct predictions
- Precision, Recall, F1-Score — Especially for the minority class (churners)
- AUC-ROC — Discrimination ability across thresholds
- Confusion Matrix — Breakdown of TP, TN, FP, FN
